title: eragrostis decumbens
intro: Eragrostis decumbens, also known as wire grass or creeping love grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Eragrostis decumbens include its ability to soothe and calm the digestive system, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Eragrostis decumbens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
